audit_items.proof_trace: The linear decay formula at lines 793-795 exactly implements `startPM - (startPM - endPM) * elapsed / duration`, matching the assertion. `_applyAssetParamsUpdates` enforces `startPM >= endPM` (line 653) and `auctionDuration > 0` (line 647), preventing underflow and division-by-zero. Line 785 bounds `elapsedTime` to `[0, auctionDuration]`, guaranteeing the formula domain invariant for all inputs.
